title: 'Murga Bana Ke Peeta Gaya': Ex-AAP Haryana Chief's Shocking Claim, Says Raghav Chadha Was Beaten At Kejriwal's 'Sheesh Mahal'
description: Shocking claims have come forth in the Raghav Chadha-Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) controversy, with former AAP Haryana President Naveen Jaihind claiming that Chadha was beaten at Arvind Kejriwal's official residence 'Sheesh Mahal'.
